summary: Complete testing of ManoProtect Reviews/Ratings System. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working including landing page testimonials and Enterprise Portal reviews management.
verified_features: GET /api/reviews/public - Returns only approved reviews - WORKING
GET /api/reviews/public?min_rating=4 - Filter by minimum rating - WORKING
GET /api/reviews/stats - Returns average_rating, total_reviews, distribution - WORKING
GET /api/public/landing-stats - Includes average_rating and total_reviews - WORKING
GET /api/reviews/admin/all - Requires enterprise auth (401 without) - WORKING
GET /api/reviews/admin/all - Returns all reviews (approved + pending) - WORKING
PATCH /api/reviews/admin/{id}/reject - Requires auth with reason - WORKING
Frontend: TestimonialsSection shows real reviews from API - WORKING
Frontend: TestimonialsSection shows rating summary (4.7 stars, 3 valoraciones) - WORKING
Frontend: TestimonialsSection shows stats (Valoración media, Familias protegidas, Valoraciones) - WORKING
Frontend: Enterprise Portal Valoraciones section displays - WORKING
Frontend: Reviews stats cards (Media, Total, 5/4/1-3 estrellas) - WORKING
Frontend: Pending reviews show Aprobar/Rechazar buttons - WORKING
Frontend: Approved reviews don't show action buttons - WORKING
Frontend: 4 seeded reviews visible in admin (3 approved + 1 pending) - WORKING

seeded_data_verification.pending_review: Carlos R. - 4 stars - 'Buena opción para empezar'

critical_code_review_comments: Reviews system implemented correctly with proper separation of public/authenticated/admin endpoints
Public API correctly filters only approved reviews
Admin API requires enterprise_session cookie authentication
Landing stats endpoint correctly integrates with user_reviews collection
Frontend TestimonialsSection properly fetches and displays real reviews from API
Enterprise Portal ReviewsSection has complete CRUD functionality with status filtering
seed_data_creation: 4 test reviews were seeded by main agent: 3 approved (Ana L., Pedro M., María G.) and 1 pending (Carlos R.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews/ratings system fully functional. All APIs working correctly. Landing page shows real reviews with average rating. Enterprise Portal has full review management capabilities. Seed data includes 4 reviews (3 approved + 1 pending). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_reviews_system.py
